heading: Compensation
label: 1105 Compensation
text: No compensation will be attached to the position of United States members of the Commission. United States members or their alternates shall be reimbursed by the Commission for travel expenses in accordance with and the Standardized Government Travel Regulations.section 5703 of title 5
notes: Codification“” substituted in text for “section 5 of the Administrative Expenses Act of 1946, as amended [],” on authority of , , , the first section of which enacted Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.Section 5703 of title 55 U.S.C. 73b–2Pub.
